mnemonics: SOCIAL APIs: Scale Often Causes Increased API Loads
keyPoints: Social websites create unpredictable, viral traffic spikes that strain infrastructure
Open APIs allow third-party applications to generate massive additional load
Capacity planning must account for external factors beyond direct user traffic
commonMistakes: Underestimating the multiplier effect of API calls from third-party apps
Failing to plan for viral content scenarios that can increase traffic 100x+
Assuming linear growth patterns instead of preparing for sudden spikes
